subcodes.first_line: Thy mention hath been made in the presence of the Manifestation of Revelation, and the Supreme Pen, turning unto thee, proclaimeth: O servant! Know thou the value of these days and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت نزد مظهر ظهور مذکور و قلم اعلی متوجها الیک میفرماید ای عبد قدر این ایام را بدان و در
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God
